markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 4. Violation of License Provisions [14600 - 14611]
##### § 14610.7

It is a misdemeanor for any person to knowingly assist in obtaining a driver’s license or identification card for any person whose presence in the United States is not authorized under federal law.

*(Added by Stats. 1993, Ch. 820, Sec. 3. Effective January 1, 1994.)*

subsections.text: It is a misdemeanor for any person to knowingly assist in obtaining a driver’s license or identification card for any person whose presence in the United States is not authorized under federal law.
